test_environment.storage_backend: NTFS — asserted by Windows 11 local-volume inference; Get-Volume returned Access denied, WMIC logicaldisk alias was unavailable, and normal/elevated fsutil returned Access denied

test_cases.description: Clean commit success — valid artifact, no failures
test_cases.trigger_condition: Valid artifact submitted, no injected failures
test_cases.pass_criterion: Both artifact and lineage record present and consistent

test_cases.description: Rollback on schema write failure — force failure after artifact write, before lineage write
test_cases.trigger_condition: Injected failure after artifact write, before lineage write
test_cases.expected_outcome: Artifact removed, no lineage INGESTED record written
test_cases.pass_criterion: Store SHA-256 hash matches pre-commit hash
test_cases.notes: Failure injected after artifact write and before lineage append; store hash restored.

test_cases.description: Rollback on lineage write failure — force failure mid-lineage write
test_cases.expected_outcome: Artifact removed or previous bytes restored; no complete INGESTED record; append-only ROLLBACK present; invalid trailing bytes quarantined with CORRUPT_RECORD evidence
test_cases.pass_criterion: Store bytes restored; no complete INGESTED record for failed transaction; schema-valid ROLLBACK record present; repaired lineage hash chain intact
test_cases.notes: Ratified AMD-v2.4.0-0001 semantics verified: partial lineage bytes quarantined; artifact state restored; no INGESTED record; CORRUPT_RECORD and ROLLBACK appended; hash chain valid.

test_cases.description: Concurrent transaction isolation — T1 forced rollback, T2 committed successfully
test_cases.trigger_condition: Two simultaneous commits, T1 force-rolled back
test_cases.expected_outcome: T2 artifact present and committed, T1 artifact absent
test_cases.pass_criterion: T2 artifact present, T1 artifact absent, no cross-contamination
test_cases.notes: Two concurrent transactions exercised; failed transaction did not remove successful artifact.

test_cases.description: Rollback timing — rollback completes within SLA under normal load
test_cases.trigger_condition: Triggered rollback on artifact under 10MB under normal load

test_cases.description: ROLLBACK lineage record — any triggered rollback produces a valid lineage record
test_cases.expected_outcome: ROLLBACK lineage record written with artifact_id, timestamp, failure_reason, transaction_id
test_cases.notes: ROLLBACK record contains transaction_id and failure reason.

test_cases.description: Store hash integrity — pre-commit hash equals post-rollback hash
test_cases.trigger_condition: Rollback triggered; compare pre-commit vs post-rollback SHA-256
test_cases.pass_criterion: SHA-256 of store pre-commit === SHA-256 of store post-rollback
test_cases.notes: Existing artifact bytes restored exactly after injected failure.

_additional_test_cases_note: Append any implementation-side test cases beyond the spec-defined set below. total_cases, passed, failed, skipped must reflect all cases including additions.

additional_test_cases.description: accepts valid submission and appends lineage
additional_test_cases.notes: Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.
Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.
Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.
Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.
Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.
Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.
Implementation-side regression or baseline test; not a substitute for spec-defined gate case.

additional_test_cases.description: rollback has no ingested record for pre-lineage failure
additional_test_cases.notes: Implementation-side regression retained after TC-01-003 gained true partial-write coverage.

anomalies: All GATE-01 spec and additional tests passed under ratified AMD-v2.4.0-0001 semantics. NTFS is asserted by Windows 11 local-volume inference because Get-Volume, WMIC, and normal/elevated fsutil could not return filesystem type; Manifest Owner acknowledgment is required at ratification. ACT-20260713-0001 is durably registered as ACTIVE HUMAN and was verified from a fresh Python process without reseeding.
